programme.title: Mom
programme.desc: Following the death of Bonnie's mother, Christy and Bonnie discover that she had been keeping a really big secret.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Jeff helps Jennifer lift her heavy sofa, but he soon feels guilty.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: A chance meeting with an old flame prompts Russell to right a previous wrong.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: Dave is eager to take on a bigger role in the community and prove himself to Calvin; Calvin's reaction makes it clear that, while the relationship between the two families has grown, the friendship between Calvin and Dave needs more time.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: When Grover gets into a fight with a bully at school, Gemma is torn between her role as principal and wanting to protect her son; Calvin encourages Marty to stand up to his own bully, only to be shocked when he learns who it is.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira tries to beautify the town; David misuses the company credit card; a grooming misstep forces Alexis and Mutt to question their relationship.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny considers running for town council; David and Stevie look for love; Alexis copes with being single.

programme.title: Due South
programme.desc: Kowalski and Fraser begin an investigation that reveals the dark side of boxing after one of Kowalski's students injures someone in the ring.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry sells One Direction merchandise then finds out the band is in town; the teachers look for excuses to avoid room 207A; Frank's expenditures are questioned.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry is promoted to full-time teacher and quickly realizes he has full-time responsibilities.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira tries to beautify the town; David misuses the company credit card; a grooming misstep forces Alexis and Mutt to question their relationship.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny considers running for town council; David and Stevie look for love; Alexis copes with being single.

programme.title: Due South
programme.desc: Kowalski and Fraser begin an investigation that reveals the dark side of boxing after one of Kowalski's students injures someone in the ring.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry sells One Direction merchandise then finds out the band is in town; the teachers look for excuses to avoid room 207A; Frank's expenditures are questioned.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry is promoted to full-time teacher and quickly realizes he has full-time responsibilities.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira tries to beautify the town; David misuses the company credit card; a grooming misstep forces Alexis and Mutt to question their relationship.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny considers running for town council; David and Stevie look for love; Alexis copes with being single.

programme.title: Fresh Off the Boat
programme.desc: Louis and the boys splurge on a pricey pay-per-view wrestling match while Jessica sleeps off the flu.

programme.title: American Housewife
programme.desc: Katie tries to get Nathan Fillion to attend the school's spring gala to impress the other moms.

programme.title: Wings
programme.desc: A famous astronaut (Robert Culp) comes to Nantucket to endorse Sandpiper Airlines.

programme.title: Wings
programme.desc: Antonio is held hostage by a crazed air-traffic controller (Dann Florek) on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker thinks one of his neighbors is sabotaging him by tampering with his laundry, apartment and mail.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is forced to host a barbecue for the gang after he receives a package containing expensive steaks.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Both Charles and Klinger develop romantic liaisons while forgetting their troubles at Rosie's Bar.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The 4077th's evacuation to a nearby cave poses a big problem for Hawkeye, then Col. Potter becomes aware of it.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: When Tina decides it's time to make home improvements, Dave volunteers to repaint the Butler house, violating Calvin's "man code" and setting off a chain of events that impacts both families.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: When Dave accidentally knocks out the Butlers' power during a heat wave, Calvin and Tina spend the night at the Johnsons' home; Malcolm has some fun at Marty's expense when he crashes at his little brother's refurbished apartment.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Audrey is upset when Jeff seems more interested in the outcome of a New York Knicks game than in her news about a big promotion; Adam and Jennifer argue over how they are spending their money.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: When Audrey makes a quilt out of Jeff's favorite T-shirts, the gift is a bigger hit than she imagined.

programme.title: Fresh Off the Boat
programme.desc: Louis and the boys splurge on a pricey pay-per-view wrestling match while Jessica sleeps off the flu.

programme.title: American Housewife
programme.desc: Katie tries to get Nathan Fillion to attend the school's spring gala to impress the other moms.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Michael strikes up a friendship with the 5-year-old daughter of his enemy when children visit the office.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Michael takes the Dunder Mifflin employees ice skating to celebrate his birthday; Kevin waits nervously for test results.

programme.title: Mom
programme.desc: Christy adopts her new boyfriend's healthy lifestyle; Bonnie and Adam decide to take the next step in their relationship.

programme.title: Mom
programme.desc: Everyone goes to Bonnie with their problems after Marjorie decides to take some time off from the group; Christy tries to overcome a painful memory.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: When Tina decides it's time to make home improvements, Dave volunteers to repaint the Butler house, violating Calvin's "man code" and setting off a chain of events that impacts both families.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: When Dave accidentally knocks out the Butlers' power during a heat wave, Calvin and Tina spend the night at the Johnsons' home; Malcolm has some fun at Marty's expense when he crashes at his little brother's refurbished apartment.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny gets thrown into the raw milk business; Moira tries to connect with the townspeople; David gives style advice.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira is worried that racy photos from her past will jeopardize the campaign; Johnny asks for financial help; Alexis gets a job.

programme.title: Due South
programme.desc: While the police force is on strike, Fraser and Kowalski help a bounty hunter find a bail jumper from Montana.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry vows to get retribution against former Olympic champion Donovan Bailey.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: When Gerry and Simon get student teachers, Gerry's hands-off approach fails; Bobbi starts taking supplements; Emma's characters bear a resemblance to some of the staff.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny gets thrown into the raw milk business; Moira tries to connect with the townspeople; David gives style advice.

programme.desc: Moira is worried that racy photos from her past will jeopardize the campaign; Johnny asks for financial help; Alexis gets a job.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira is worried that racy photos from her past will jeopardize the campaign; Johnny asks for financial help; Alexis gets a job.

programme.title: Fresh Off the Boat
programme.desc: Louis worries about Grandma's safety in her new motorized wheelchair; Jessica fears that Emery has turned into a hoarder; Eddie tries to hustle his way into Evan's successful side business.

programme.title: American Housewife
programme.desc: Katie figures out a new way to make the spring gala a success; Greg attempts to be a fun dad and winds up adopting a dog while Katie is occupied with other things.

programme.title: Wings
programme.desc: Joe still can't convince Brian and Helen that Sandy Cooper is obsessed with him when she returns to Nantucket.

programme.title: Wings
programme.desc: Joe and Helen try to increase their social circle by meeting a couple (Tony Carreiro, Amy Von Nostrand) whom Fay knows.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker's dismay at his neighbor leaving town makes Reggie jealous, and she believes he has more than casual feelings for the woman.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker must face his true feelings for Chris (Nancy Travis), angering Reggie, who has been repressing something too.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: B.J. tries to organize a present-day, stateside gathering of 4077th families.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Col. Flagg shows up at the 4077th again, convinced that Hawkeye is a Communist sympathizer.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: The Butlers and Johnsons decide to go on a double date, and they all get more than they bargained for at a new restaurant; Grover invites Malcolm and Marty to be the first guests on his new podcast.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: Dave and Tina discover a common bond when they attend a concert together; Gemma seeks the Butlers' help when an unwelcome visitor takes up residence in the Johnson home.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Jeff tries to solve a problem that Audrey has with a neighbor, but he ends up making it worse.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Jeff and Audrey decide to have separate bedrooms when his snoring keeps her awake, but he takes advantage of his newfound freedom by staying up too late.

programme.title: Fresh Off the Boat
programme.desc: Louis worries about Grandma's safety in her new motorized wheelchair; Jessica fears that Emery has turned into a hoarder; Eddie tries to hustle his way into Evan's successful side business.

programme.title: American Housewife
programme.desc: Katie figures out a new way to make the spring gala a success; Greg attempts to be a fun dad and winds up adopting a dog while Katie is occupied with other things.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Dwight finds half a joint in the parking lot and launches a full investigation; Michael asks an unusual favor.
